case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. SANTOS HUMBERTO FLORES MURCIA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MURCIA, SANTOS HUMBERTO FLORES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF MAILING ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED OCT-30-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MURCIA, SANTOS HUMBERTO FLORES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
